class.name: Warden
class.description: Armed with a shield and stubbornresolve, Wardens stand in defense of their allies and the innocent wherever theytravel. Their source of strength is their bottomless tolerance for punishment.

starting_equipment.items: Chain Mail, Shield,Warhammer, 6 Javelins, Dungeoneer’s Pack, and 15 GP

class_features.name: FightingStyle
class_features.description: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice. Defenseis recommended. You can replace this feat whenever you gain a Warden level.

class_features.name: Sentinel’s Stand
class_features.description: Choose one benefit:Stalwart Spirit (proficiency in one saving throw of your choice), SteadfastToughness (HP maximum increases by Constitution modifier + Warden level), orTower Shield (+3 bonus to AC with a Shield, increasing to +4 at level 10). Youcan change this choice whenever you gain a Warden level.

class_features.name: Weapon Mastery
class_features.description: You can use the mastery properties oftwo kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons. You can change these choiceswhenever you finish a Long Rest.

class_features.name: Guardian Tactics
class_features.description: You gain three tactics used as Bonus Actions: Block (allywithin 5ft gains your AC if higher), Challenge (enemy has Disadvantage onattacks against others), and Grasp (5ft emanation prevents enemies from movingfurther away).

class_features.name: Unyielding Resolve
class_features.description: While you are Bloodied, you have Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, andSlashing damage.

class_features.name: Warden Subclass
class_features.description: You gain a Warden subclass of your choice, granting features atlevels 3, 6, 10, and 17.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: You gain the Ability Score Improvement feat or another feat forwhich you qualify. You gain this feature again at levels 8, 12, and 16.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: You can attack twice insteadof once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Interrupt
class_features.description: Reaction: When an enemy within 5ft takes anaction that allows multiple attacks or abilities (like Multiattack), you preventone of them. You have 3 uses, regaining one on a Short Rest and all on a LongRest. Uses increase at higher levels.

class_features.name: Mettle
class_features.description: When you succeed on a Constitution save to take half damage, youinstead take no damage, and only half damage if you fail. Does not functionwhile Incapacitated.

class_features.name: Survive
class_features.description: Whenreduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead and regain HPequal to twice your Warden level. Once per Long Rest.

class_features.name: Sentinel’s Strike
class_features.description: Choose one benefit: Interdict (make a meleeattack as part of Interrupt; regain Interrupt on Initiative) or Shield Slam(once per turn on hit, bash with shield for 1d8 + AC bonus). You can change thischoice whenever you finish a Long Rest.

class_features.name: Font ofLife
class_features.description: At the start of your turn, you can end one condition onyourself (no action required). You have 2 uses per Long Rest, regaining one on aShort Rest.

class_features.name: Extended Tactics
class_features.description: Therange of your Guardian Tactics increases to 10 feet (Block and Challenge) ora 10-foot emanation (Grasp).

class_features.name: Improved Resolve
class_features.description: While you are Bloodied, you have Resistance to every damage typeexcept Force, Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant.

class_features.name: Sentinel’s Soul
class_features.description: Choose one benefit: All-Seeing (30ftBlindsight), Fortified (no attack roll has Advantage against you), orUnstoppable (move through creature spaces; Prone them if same size or smaller).You can change this choice whenever you finish a Long Rest.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat or another featof your choice for which you qualify.

class_features.name: LegendaryResistance
class_features.description: If you fail a saving throw, you can choose tosucceed instead. You have 3 uses per Long Rest.

features.name: Primal Warrior
features.description: Gain proficiency in Animal Handling, Nature, or Survival with aConstitution bonus. Gain Advantage on attack rolls while Bloodied (once perInitiative/Rest).

features.name: Roar
features.description: BonusAction: 5ft emanation pushes Large or smaller creatures 5ft away and preventsOpportunity Attacks.

features.name: Hunting Grounds
features.description: Ignore difficult terrain and gain Climb and Swim speeds equal to your Speed.

features.name: Wild Pounce
features.description: Once per turn on hitwith Melee/Unarmed, deal extra 1d8 Slashing damage and target is Prone if Largeor smaller.

features.name: Aspect of the Beast
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1 minute, gain Advantage on attacks while Bloodied, dealbleeding wounds (1d10 Necrotic/turn), and double your Speed. Once per LongRest.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You gain Sorcerer spellcasting using Charisma.You regain slots on a Long Rest.

features.name: Mortal Metamagic
features.description: Expend Hit Point Dice to use Empowered Spell (1 die) orQuickened Spell (2 dice).

features.name: Arcane Strike
features.description: When you take the Attack action, replace one attack with aSorcerer cantrip (1 action casting time).

features.name: DraconicVengeance
features.description: Reaction (when damaged within 10ft): Expend a HitPoint Die to deal elemental damage in a 10ft emanation.

features.name: Aspect of the Greatwyrm
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1 minute,gain a 6d6 Breath Weapon, extra 1d6 elemental damage on hits, and a 60ft FlySpeed. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Anointed Block
features.description: Block adds 1d4 to theally's attack rolls and saving throws.

features.name: DivineMandate
features.description: Learn two Cleric cantrips, gain Religion proficiencywith a Constitution bonus, and gain Radiant Resistance.

features.name: Benediction
features.description: Cast Daylight, Lesser Restoration,Sanctuary, or Zone of Truth once per Long Rest without a slot.

features.name: Selfless Survival
features.description: You can expend youruse of Survive to prevent the demise of a creature within 30 feet.

features.name: Sainted Mantle
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1minute, gain HP regeneration and cast Spirit Guardians without a slot. Once perLong Rest.

features.name: Battle Tactics
features.description: You gain Battle Dice (d6s) andmaneuvers. You regain dice on Initiative or Rest. Save DC = 8 + Str/Dex mod +PB.

features.name: Siege Defender
features.description: Gain Advantageon readied/opportunity attacks if you haven't moved. Enemies lose Advantageagainst you if you are near 2+ allies.

features.name: UnyieldingSurge
features.description: Regain an expended Battle Die when you become Bloodied.Once per Initiative/Rest.

features.name: Hold the Line
features.description: While in your Grasp emanation, you and allies have Advantage onStr, Dex, and Con saves.

features.name: Unbreakable Sentinel
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1 minute, regain a Battle Die each turn, adddice to maneuver damage for free, and gain an extra Bonus Action for maneuvers.Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Death’s Gambit
features.description: Challenged enemies you damage dropto 0 HP if they have fewer HP than twice your Warden level.

features.name: Grave Keeper
features.description: Gain 60ft Darkvision, NecroticResistance, and Undead Empathy (Undead must save or miss attacks against you).

features.name: Innate Necromancy
features.description: Cast Darkness,False Life, Gentle Repose, or Speak with Dead once per Long Rest without aslot.

features.name: Undying
features.description: You can use yourSurvive feature three times per Long Rest.

features.name: Gravelord
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1 minute, gain a 15ft FrightfulAura and cast Vampiric Touch as a level 5 spell. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Stonewall
features.description: Block reduces physical damage dealt to you or the ally by yourShield's AC bonus.

features.name: Earthshatter
features.description: Replace an attack with a slam; creatures within 5ft (10ft at level 14) mustsave or be Prone.

features.name: Roots of Rock
features.description: Youare Immovable and gain Prone Immunity.

features.name: LegendaryInterruption
features.description: You can use your Interrupt feature to prevent anenemy's Legendary Action attack.

features.name: StoneforgedChampion
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1 minute, use Earthshatter forfree, gain +4 Strength, and gain Resistance to all damage while Bloodied. Onceper Long Rest.

features.name: Thunderblast
features.description: Creatures in your Grasp emanationtake 1d8 Lightning damage.

features.name: Seafarer
features.description: Conjure harmless lightning, gain Lightning/Thunder Resistance, and gain a SwimSpeed.

features.name: Storm Wings
features.description: Gain a Fly Speedequal to your Speed at the start of each of your turns.

features.name: Lightning Step
features.description: Bonus Action: Teleport 60ft anddeal 4d8 Lightning damage to nearby creatures. Restore use by expending anInterrupt.

features.name: Stormlord
features.description: Bonus Action:For 1 minute, cast Call Lightning, gain a 60ft Fly Speed, and improveThunderblast to 3d8. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Grasping Vines
features.description: Grasprange increases to 10 feet (15 feet at level 14) for creatures on the ground.

features.name: Cultivator
features.description: Gain Nature, Stealth, orSurvival proficiency with a Constitution bonus. Ignore difficult terrain andplant-based spell effects.

features.name: Nature’s Emissary
features.description: Cast Goodberry, Plant Growth, Spike Growth, or Speak with Plantsonce per Long Rest without a slot.

features.name: VerdantResilience
features.description: When you use Survive, you and allies within 10ftgain Temporary HP equal to twice your Warden level.

features.name: Oak Sentinel
features.description: Bonus Action: For 1 minute, gain +4 AC, deal 4d6Piercing damage to attackers, and restrain enemies in a 15ft emanation. Once perLong Rest.
